summary: Video. A FOX 7 (Austin) local TV news package ('FOX 7' bug with clock and temperature, 'THREE ARRESTED ACCUSED OF MILLIONS IN GIFT CARD FRAUD' chyron) shows suspect mugshots, gift card aisle B-roll, and a pile of seized cards. A reporter says that three Latvian nationals allegedly cloned and resold gift cards in Texas. It is a recorded broadcast news segment.
notable_text: THREE ARRESTED ACCUSED OF MILLIONS IN GIFT CARD FRAUD; FOX 7; Gift Cards
